features: With bursting beads Gently exfoliates for invigorated skin all day
Suitable for use in the morning or evening
Formula removes dirt, oil and impurities
description: Product Description Clean & Clear® Morning Energy Skin Energising Daily Facial Scrub for beautiful-looking, refreshed skin. It is a gentle exfoliating daily facial scrub that has been formulated with tangerine extract. The formula not only removes dirt, oil and impurities, but also leaves your skin feeling refreshed and invigorated for the day ahead. The refreshing citrus fragrance will also awaken your senses! Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Microcrystalline Cellulose, Lauryl Glucoside, Cellulose, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Sodium Benzoate, Menthyl Lactate, Parfum, Linalyl Acetate, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Citric Acid, Disodium EDTA, Sodium Hydroxide, Propylene Glycol, Mannitol, LACTOSE, Tocopheryl Acetate, CI 77492, Citrus Tangerina Extract, Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose, CI 77491, CI 15985, Menthyl Benzoate [PR-0006264] Product and ingredients may change. Always check the label before purchasing and using this product. Directions To use this product, wet your face, take a small amount of the scrub and gently massage it onto your face in circular motions. Rinse off with warm water and pat dry. Use it regularly for best results. Safety Warning Caution: for external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. In the event of contact - flush with water. Discontinue use if skin irritation develops. Keep out of reach of children. Box Contains 1 x Clean and Clear Morning Energy Skin Energising Daily Facial Scrub 150 ml Manufacturer Contact Information Johnson & Johnson Ltd., Maidenhead, SL6 3UG. Johnson & Johnson Ltd., Tallaght, Dublin 24. See more
